name: Real-World - Proxy Caller for Family Member
description: Caller files/checks a claim on behalf of a family member.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I'm calling for my wife - it's her car and her battery, but she asked me to sort out the warranty.
expectedOutcome: Agent handles the third-party caller gracefully, collects what's available, notes which details must be confirmed by the owner, and proceeds or transfers appropriately without blocking on owner-only info where avoidable.
